title: Code review LICHEN Zephyr C code
description: Review LICHEN-owned Zephyr C code for correctness, safety, and test gaps. Scope excludes vendored upstream Zephyr sources.
notes: Review confidence: ~35% chance of missed bug. Least confident areas: complete RFC-level correctness of EDHOC/OSCORE transcripts, hardware-only LR1110 behavior, and Zephyr net integration paths not compiled locally. Would raise confidence by running full native_sim/target Zephyr builds, fuzzing SCHC/RPL/OSCORE parsers, and hardware RX/TX tests.
close_reason: Code review completed; actionable findings filed as child issues project-LICHEN-kqma.1 through project-LICHEN-kqma.17.
